description_long: This is a large, heavily armored military tank with a long main cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The vehicle features a robust tracked propulsion system with wide treads for traversing rough terrain. Multiple hatches, periscopes, and external storage compartments are visible on the upper hull and turret. The tank is painted in an olive drab color with a matte finish, and a white star insignia is visible on the side, indicating military use. The front and sides are protected by thick, sloped armor plating, and the rear includes additional storage racks and equipment. The vehicle's design emphasizes durability, firepower, and crew protection, making it suitable for urban and battlefield environments.
description: A large, olive drab military tank with a long cannon, thick sloped armor, and wide tracks. Features include a rotating turret, external storage, and visible military insignia.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long main cannon, turret details, wide tracks, and a white star insignia on the hull.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual barrels, thick frontal armor, and the symmetrical arrangement of the tracks and headlights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rear storage racks, turret, and the full length of the cannon.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the turret, storage racks, and the rear armor and track assembly.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon mounted on the turret, two smaller barrels at the front hull, and possible machine gun mounts on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor plating on the front, sides, and rear; reinforced turret and hull with visible modular panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive drab paint scheme with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White star insignia on the side of the turret and hull.
